name: beyondcompare-mcp
description: Beyond Compare MCP Server - File and directory comparison capabilities
long_description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides file and directory comparison capabilities using Beyond Compare. This server enables AI models to compare files, synchronize directories, and generate comparison reports through Beyond Compare's powerful comparison engine.

beyond_compare_executable.title: Beyond Compare Executable
beyond_compare_executable.description: Path to Beyond Compare executable (BCompare.exe on Windows, bcompare on Linux/Mac)

workspace_directory.title: Workspace Directory
workspace_directory.description: Directory for temporary script files and comparison reports

command_timeout.title: Command Timeout
command_timeout.description: Timeout for Beyond Compare operations in seconds

tools.name: compare_files
tools.description: Compare two files using Beyond Compare and return detailed comparison results

tools.name: compare_folders
tools.description: Compare two folders using Beyond Compare with optional subfolder inclusion

tools.name: sync_folders
tools.description: Synchronize folders using Beyond Compare with various sync modes (mirror, update, backup)

prompts.name: file_comparison_analysis
prompts.description: Analyze file comparison results and provide insights
prompts.text: Based on the file comparison results, analyze the differences and provide actionable insights.
